title: Why Philippines is the Top Destination for Indian Medical Students in 2026
author: LIMRA Team
excerpt: The Philippines continues to be the number one destination for Indian students pursuing MBBS abroad. Here's why thousands of students choose Philippines every year.

title: FMGE 2026: How to Prepare and What to Expect

title: NMC Guidelines for MBBS Abroad: Everything You Need to Know
